events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at RB Leipzig

headlines.description: Champions Bayer Leverkusen cruised to a 4-1 victory at Hoffenheim on Saturday thanks to a dazzling performance by Victor Boniface that included two goals and an assist.
headlines.shortLinkText: Boniface shines, Leverkusen back to winning ways

video.headline: Leverkusen bounce back in Hoffenheim thrashing

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (TSG Hoffenheim vs. Bayer Leverkusen - Game Highlights) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

headlines.description: Bayern Munich's Harry Kane scored a hat trick as they crushed promoted Holstein Kiel 6-1 away on Saturday to move top of the Bundesliga
headlines.shortLinkText: Harry Kane bags hat trick as Bayern thump Kiel

video.headline: Kane scores hat trick as Bayern thrash Holstein Kiel

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Kane scores hat trick as Bayern thrash Holstein Kiel) 2024/09/14 ESHEET
